posts.snippet: Foundation has delivered two Phantom MK-1 humanoid robots to Ukraine for testing, the company told Time. Co-founder Mike LeBlanc called what he witnessed in Ukraine "truly shocking," describing it as "a full-scale robot war where the robot is the primary fighter."
posts.snippet_en: Foundation has delivered two Phantom MK-1 humanoid robots to Ukraine for testing, the company told Time. Co-founder Mike LeBlanc called what he witnessed in Ukraine "truly shocking," describing it as "a full-scale robot war where the robot is the primary fighter."

posts.snippet: Ukraine got two Phantom MK-1 humanoid robots for testing in February, Time reports. They can resupply troops, scout bunkers and use any human weapon. Veteran co-founder Leblanc calls Ukraine "a full-scale robot war where robots are the primary fighters."
posts.snippet_en: Ukraine got two Phantom MK-1 humanoid robots for testing in February, Time reports. They can resupply troops, scout bunkers and use any human weapon. Veteran co-founder Leblanc calls Ukraine "a full-scale robot war where robots are the primary fighters."

posts.snippet: Официальным каналом Центра "Рубикон" опубликовано свыше 20 000 эпизодов поражения целей противника. Структура и динамика пораженных целей по типам: 35,4% (+0,7%) - Беспилотные системы (мультикоптерные и самолетные БПЛА, НРТК) 16,6% (+0,1%) - Средства связи и наблюдения 15,7% (-0,2%) - Наземные защищенные цели (ПВД, полевые укрепления) 13,2% (-0,2%) - Небронированная автомобильная техника 9,4% (-0,
posts.snippet_en: Over 20,000 episodes of enemy target destruction have been published by the official channel of the "Rubicon" Center. The structure and dynamics of destroyed targets by type are as follows: 35.4% (+0.7%) - Unmanned systems (multicopter and fixed-wing UAVs, reconnaissance and targeting complexes), 16.6% (+0.1%) - Communication and observation systems, 15.7% (-0.2%) - Protected ground targets (fortified areas, field fortifications), 13.2% (-0.2%) - Unarmored vehicles, 9.4% (-0.2%) - Armored vehicles.

posts.snippet: Ось такий РЕБ зайшов противнику на фронт. Надсилають хлопцi з рiзних фронтiв. Як для макета, багато клопоту з вентиляторами, знімними складними кріпленнями. Проти відео ніхто з землі не працює. Раз ФПВ наши рознесли цiй РЕБ, то значить рішення проти Мавіків. Ставлять їх по 3-5 в ряд.
posts.snippet_en: Here's the kind of FPV drone the enemy is using on the front. They're sending them from various fronts. As a model, it's a lot of trouble with the fans, with removable complex mounts. Against video, no one on the ground works. Once our FPVs destroyed this FPV, it means the decision against Mavics. They're placing them in rows of 3-5.

posts.snippet: Це ті сто детекторів FPV, на які я, колись зібрав гроші, купив і відправив по армії незнайомим людям. І ось таких відгуків я отримав чимало. Ці відгуки не мені, а всім Вам, хто тоді допоміг у зборі коштів. Я відразу під час збору написав, що ми врятуємо багато життів. Допомогти військовим було одним із завдань, але сто приладів не вирішать проблеми всіх фронтів. Я купив прилади різних виробників,
posts.snippet_en: These are the hundred FPV detectors that I once collected money for, bought, and sent to the army to strangers. And I received many such reviews. These reviews are not for me, but for all of you who helped with fundraising back then. I immediately wrote during the collection that we would save many lives. Helping the military was one of the goals, but a hundred devices will not solve the problems of all fronts. I bought devices from different manufacturers,

posts.snippet: Поражение безэкипажных катеров противника FPV-дронами ВС РФ в районе Тендровской косы и островной зоны устья Днепра. Видео: https://t.me/The_Wrong_Side
posts.snippet_en: Russian forces have destroyed enemy unmanned boats using FPV drones in the area of Tendrov Spit and the island zone at the mouth of the Dnipro River. Video: https://t.me/The_Wrong_Side
